findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The entire page appears to be rendered with browser-default serif typography and unstyled HTML controls/layout rather than the Birch visual system; headings, lists, code blocks, and tables have no visible stylesheet treatment.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The mobile deep render appears globally unstyled with default browser serif text, raw list/table formatting, and no Birch layout treatment.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The desktop viewport appears globally unstyled, using default browser typography and raw document flow rather than the expected Birch-styled artifact layout.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The mobile viewport appears globally unstyled with default serif headings/body text and raw document layout.

findings.name: vision_clipped_content
findings.evidence: Mobile deep render has severe horizontal overflow: the chart, numeric table, ranking panel, and caveat area extend beyond the right edge, with content/labels cut off and a page-level horizontal scrollbar visible. The layout is not usable without sideways scrolling and several panels are visibly truncated.
